notes:
v1.2.11 Update
🐛 Live Mode Character Reset Permissions: Players can no longer double-click staged NPCs they do not own to reset their standing image position. GMs and owners can still reset characters they control.

announcement.title: 🌸 Visual Novel Maker v1.2.11
announcement.content:
Visual Novel Maker v1.2.11 fixes a live mode character control permission issue.

  • Players can no longer double-click staged NPCs they do not own to reset their standing image position.
  • GMs and owners can still reset characters they control.
